data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199007: This ferry is built to plow through\nfast-running currents.\pWe hope you enjoy your voyage with us.\nFeel free to explore the ship.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199088: We hope you enjoy your voyage on\nour ferry.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1990B4: We have made land in SLATEPORT CITY.\nThank you for sailing with us.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1990F8: We have made land in LILYCOVE CITY.\nThank you for sailing with us.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_19913B:
It'll be some time before we make land,
I reckon.\pYou can rest up in your cabin if you'd
like. Your cabin's No. 2.\pThe bed in there is soft and plushy.
I can attest to how comfy it is!
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199203: Go visit other cabins.\nTRAINERS bored of the boat trip will\lbe itching to battle.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199291:
MR. BRINEY: Welcome aboard, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pThey made me honorary captain of the
S.S. TIDAL!\pYou can call me CAPTAIN BRINEY now!\pYou know, I retired once before, but
when I saw this majestic ship...\pLet me just say, it stirred my sleeping
soul as a sailor!
